item.title:

Arsenal Aston Villa Crystal
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 2min The 12 clubs still in Europe this season:
Arsenal Aston Villa Crystal Palace Nottingham Forest
Bayern Munich Freiberg
Paris Saint-Germain Strasbourg
Atletico Madrid Rayo Vallecano
Braga
Shakhtar Donetsk 3 14 39 1 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2min Eduardo Camavinga: “I take responsibility for my part”.
“I want to apologise to
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 2min Eduardo Camavinga: “I take responsibility for my part”.
“I want to apologise to team and to the Madridistas. Thank you for support, hala Madrid”. 217 150 1 mil 23 mil

item.title: laythy29: Connor Humm reposteó Layth @laythy29 · 46min Whoever's on the Sky live blog here at the City Ground needs to focus on Fo
item.description: Connor Humm reposteó Layth @laythy29 · 46min Whoever's on the Sky live blog here at the City Ground needs to focus on Forest rather than make utterly pointless digs against Arsenal...maybe just concentrate on the game in hand here in Nottingham rather than try and mug off Arsenal for the sake of it eh...? 43 89 524 25 mil
